ip_outcome_note: No suspected_ip flag from vision pass; no IP verification required. Depicted figures are unnamed Azorius lawmages and an unnamed horned captive; no source identifies any of them as named lore characters and triviabot does not promote role overlap to identity.

trivia_bullets.text: Lawmages on Ravnica belong to the Azorius Senate's Lyev Column and 'create spells that compel or restrain beings,' serving a constabulary/enforcement function in outlying districts [MTG Wiki: Azorius Senate].

Designed as the Azorius entry in Ravnica Allegiance's guild-common removal cycle; Hipsters of the Coast's set-design review notes it is the first instant-speed Pacifism variant ever printed and flags it as a possible footgun at common since 'such a card won't remove a creature from combat even though it looks like it would,' while still calling it 'just amazing' [Hipsters of the Coast: 'The Designs of Ravnica Allegiance', Jan 2019].
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: The Designs of Ravnica Allegiance (2019-01)

trivia_bullets.text: Illustrated by Mark Behm, who has art credits on roughly 60 Magic cards across multiple sets [Scryfall artist search: Mark Behm]. Reprinted in Jumpstart (JMP #453, 2020) and circulated through 'The List' Set Boosters [Scryfall; Nerd Rage Gaming inventory listing].
sources: Nerd Rage Gaming: The List Reprints listing

trivia_bullets.text: The Ravnica Allegiance printing has no flavor text — the textbox is pure rules text (Flash; Enchant creature; enchanted creature can't attack or block, and its activated abilities can't be activated) [MythicSpoiler: rna/lawmagesbinding].

Niche in Commander: appears in roughly 3.85K decks at a 0.19% inclusion rate, leaning into enchantress / pillowfort shells under commanders like Zur the Enchanter, Tuvasa the Sunlit, and Grand Arbiter Augustin IV; top listed synergy partners are Prison Realm, Martial Law, Archon of the Triumvirate, and Arrest [EDHREC: Lawmage's Binding].

related_cards.name: Stasis Snare
related_cards.note: The card Hipsters of the Coast says they expected Lawmage's Binding to functionally be — instant-speed exile in Azorius colors, the design comparison point the article calls out explicitly.

related_cards.name: Pacifism
related_cards.note: The original mono-white aura template Lawmage's Binding is a flash, Azorius-color variant of; named directly in the Hipsters design article.

related_cards.name: Arrest
related_cards.note: Listed by EDHREC as a top synergy partner / functional cousin (aura that also shuts off activated abilities); both share the 'shut the creature off entirely' design space.

related_cards.name: Prison Realm
related_cards.note: EDHREC's highest-lift synergy partner — enchantment-based creature lockdown, same archetype slot.

related_cards.name: Archon of the Triumvirate
related_cards.note: EDHREC top synergy; another Azorius restrain-the-creature effect from the original Ravnica block, thematic sibling for the lawmage/detain flavor.
